name: Scaleway
description: Monitor Scaleway EU cloud infrastructure and user access for compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Scaleway Console at https://console.scaleway.com
2. Go to IAM → API Keys
3. Generate an API key with Read access
4. Copy the Secret Key and enter it below

credentialFields.label: Secret Key
credentialFields.helpText: The Secret Key from your Scaleway IAM API Key (not the Access Key ID).

credentialFields.label: Organization ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Scaleway Console → Organization → Settings → Organization ID

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists Scaleway projects for cloud infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Scaleway IAM users and their access to infrastructure
